import { Box, FormLabel, TextField } from '@material-ui/core'
import React from 'react'

function EditAccount() {
    return (
        <Box>
            <form>

                <TextField
                    variant='outlined'
                    placeholder='Name'
                />

                <TextField
                    variant='outlined'
                    placeholder='Name'
                />
            </form>
        </Box>
    )
}

export default EditAccount
